_meta.source: Mohamed's rate20 session 2026-06-11 (13 rated) + cross-compare 4/5 kyan + all prior rejections
_meta.rule: This file IS the bar. The critic mind judges against it. Updated after every rating session.

kills.name: generic_celebration_template
kills.why: rated 1-2: 'بمناسبة X اطلبوا Y واستمتعوا' — the occasion bolted onto an order-CTA with zero thought
examples_bad: الآن بمناسبة اليوم الوطني، اطلبوا بروستد البيك واستمتعوا بالنكهة الأصيلة
أطلب دجاجنا المشوي بمناسبة يوم التأسيس واحتفل بمذاق أصيل

kills.name: very_normal
kills.why: his words: 'nothing wrong but its very normal' — correct, safe, dead. If any brand could post it, it's dead
examples_bad: قهوتنا السعودية تبتدي يومك بمذاق أصيل

kills.name: generic_engagement_bait
kills.why: his words: 'very generic and easy' — questions with no idea behind them

kills.name: offer_energy_on_emotional_occasion
kills.why: his words on barns ramadan: 'good for offers not ramadan' — discounts/urgency on ramadan/eid/national day kill the moment

kills.name: not_saudi
kills.why: his words on shawarmer: 'not saudi' — MSA-ish or pan-Arab phrasing on a Saudi-voice brand
kills.rule: dialect must match the brand's DNA dialect exactly

rewards.name: concrete_warm_scene
rewards.why: herfy eid = 5: family + holiday joy + warmth in ONE concrete frame; kyan 4/5: family iftar coffee scene
examples_good: عيد الفطر أجواء وفرحة! اطلب برغر هرفي واحتفل مع العائلة والأحباب بحلاوة العيد ودفء التجمع 💖
قهوة سعودية مع العائلة في الإفطار، تبرّد القلوب وتجمع الحبايب! اطلبها الآن من أقرب كيان 🩵

rewards.name: clean_clear_offer
rewards.why: zara new product = 5, barns weekly = 4: offers need clarity not creativity — what/how much/until when/where
examples_good: كوليكشن الموسم الجديد وصل! استمتع بالألوان والتصاميم المبتكرة. اطلب الآن عبر تطبيق زارا أو في فروع المملكة.

rewards.name: an_actual_idea
rewards.why: the standing demand: a visible angle — a human truth, a moment, a wink — not a formula
rewards.rule: before rendering, the angle must be nameable in one sentence; if you can't name the idea, don't write the caption

open_gaps.name: bilingual_pattern
open_gaps.why: his note on namshi: 'we need good pattern for english and arabic' — EN-led brands need a designed AR/EN structure, not random mixing
